findings.summary: Secret compared with == instead of constant-time equality (timing side-channel)
findings.evidence: provided === expected short-circuits on the first differing byte; response time leaks how many leading bytes matched, enabling byte-at-a-time recovery over many requests.

findings.summary: Off-by-one lets an expired token pass for one extra second
findings.evidence: uses `now <= exp` where the spec is `now < exp`; a token is accepted on the exact expiry second.

findings.summary: Claims the regex is catastrophically backtracking
findings.evidence: the pattern has no nested quantifier over an overlapping class; input length is capped at 64 upstream. No ReDoS.
